title: Add Tooltips to Metric Creation Button and Category Gear Icon
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want helpful tooltips on the metric creation button and the category gear icon, so that I understand what each control does before clicking it.
description:
Two tooltips needed to be added to the Metrics Glossary interface to improve discoverability and guide users through the workflow.

## Tooltip Specifications

1. **Metric creation button** (disabled state) — tooltip text: "Please enter a metric into the text box to enable this button to create your metric."
2. **Category gear icon** — tooltip text: "Add and edit Line of Business and Topics."

## Technical Constraint

Adding a tooltip to a disabled button presented a challenge with the current Bootstrap/jQuery version. Standard tooltip behavior does not attach to disabled elements. The workaround applies the tooltip to an active wrapper element rather than the disabled button directly.
acceptance_criteria: Disabled metric creation button shows tooltip: 'Please enter a metric into the text box to enable this button to create your metric.'
Category gear icon shows tooltip: 'Add and edit Line of Business and Topics'
Tooltip on disabled button works correctly despite Bootstrap/jQuery version constraints
ux_changes: Added instructional tooltips to the metric creation button (in disabled state) and the category gear icon. The disabled-button tooltip required a wrapper element workaround due to Bootstrap/jQuery version limitations.
implementation_notes: Bootstrap tooltips do not natively attach to disabled elements. The solution wraps the disabled button in a container element that receives the tooltip. This pattern is specific to the Bootstrap/jQuery versions in use.
comment_summary: Developer encountered a technical limitation where Bootstrap tooltips could not be applied to disabled buttons with the current library versions. Various solutions from older Bootstrap/jQuery versions were tried but did not work. The issue was flagged for guidance.
